hero.header: Start your journey to a healthier life… from here

stats.description: A certified clinical nutritionist and health coach with experience helping over 896 women achieve their health goals

services.title: How I Can Help You
services.subtitle: Comprehensive nutrition services designed to transform your health

items.title: Weight Management
items.description: Sustainable weight loss or gain programs tailored to your body type, lifestyle, and cultural dietary preferences.

items.title: Disease Management
items.description: Nutrition plans for diabetes, hypertension, heart conditions, and other health conditions with medical oversight.

items.title: Prenatal & Postnatal
items.description: Specialized nutrition care for expecting and new mothers ensuring optimal health for both mother and baby.

items.title: Family Nutrition
items.description: Complete nutrition guidance for the whole family, from children's healthy development to elderly dietary needs.

items.title: Meal Planning
items.description: Custom meal plans with delicious Egyptian and Mediterranean recipes that fit your caloric and nutritional goals.

items.title: Health Analysis
items.description: In-depth body composition analysis, metabolic testing, and regular progress tracking with detailed reports.

about.title: A passion for creating real change in your nutritional lifestyle
about.description: Dr. Nashwa is a certified clinical nutritionist with over 8 years of experience in delivering personalized nutrition programs that help you achieve your health goals sustainably

journey.title: My Professional Journey
journey.subtitle: From academic study to real-world application

timeline.title: Bachelor's Degree
timeline.description: Graduated from Cairo University Faculty of Medicine with honors, specializing in clinical nutrition

timeline.title: Master's Degree
timeline.description: Earned MSc in Clinical Nutrition with focused research on metabolic health and diabetes management

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: I opened my private clinic and started helping clients directly in Cairo and Mansoura

timeline.title: Ongoing Results
timeline.description: I help hundreds of women achieve their health goals through personalized plans and sustainable results
